title: The Pensions Act, 1871
full_text: The Pensions Act, 1871 पेंशन अधिनियम,1871 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187123 Act Number: 23 Enactment Date: 1871-08-18 Act Year: 1871 Short Title: The Pensions Act, 1871 Hindi Title: पेंशन अधिनियम,1871 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to pensions and grants by Government of money or land-revenue. Ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions Department: Department of Pensions and Pensioners Welfare Enforcement Date: 18-08-1871 Last Updated: 15-03-2019 Schedule 1. SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Pensions Act, 1871 I. --PRELIMINARY II.--RIGHTS TO PENSIONS III.--MODE OF PAYMENT IV.--MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Title and extent. Section 2. [Repealed.]. Section 3. Interpretation-Section. Section 3A. Definition. Section 4. Bar of suits relating to pensions. Section 5. Claims to be made to collector, Deputy Commissioner or other authorised officer. Section 6. Civil Court empowered to take cognizance of such claims. Section 7. Pensions for lands held under grants in perpetuity. Section 8. Payment to be made by Deputy Commissioner, Collector or other authorised officer Section 9. Saving of rights of grantees of land-revenue. Section 10. Commutation of pensions. Section 11. Exemption of pension from attachment. Section 12. Assignments, etc., in anticipation of pension, to be void. Section 12A. Nomination by pensioner to receive moneys outstanding on account of pension. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Reward to informers. Section 14. Power to make rules. Section 15. Power of Central Government to make rules Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Laying of rules. Schedule 1. SCHEDULE.
